kerria.enabled.tooltip: Enables or disables Kerria. Has no effect when OpenGL 4.5 is not supported.
kerria.fastUpload.tooltip: Optimize CPU -> GPU texture upload with persistently mapped buffers and pixel buffer objects
kerria.cache.tooltip: Cache uploaded textures to eliminate CPU -> GPU upload, and transfer sub-textures between GPU memory directly
kerria.bufferSize.tooltip: Specifies the size of the persistently mapped buffer, in KBs
kerria.minCacheSize.tooltip: Specifies the initial cache size for animated textures
kerria.maxCacheSize.tooltip: Specifies the maximum cache size for animated textures
